3035150.name: Welding Simulator
3035150.description:
Welding Simulator is a realistic, first-person welding simulation that allows you to learn and master various metal joining and cutting techniques. In the game, you will play the role of a welder who gains experience by performing various tasks. You will learn MMA, MIG and TIG methods, and you will be able to experiment with different materials and tools to create precise and durable structures.

Key Features:

  • Authentic Welding Techniques – practice MMA, MIG, and TIG.

  • Cutting and Processing – precisely cut and adjust elements.

  • Various Projects – create metal tables, bike frames, go-karts and other complex structures.

  • Workshop Customization – upgrade gear, organize tools, and expand your space.

  • Career Mode – earn money, invest in equipment, and tackle bigger challenges.

Whether you’re just starting out or looking to sharpen your technique, Welding Simulator offers a safe, accessible way to explore the craft of welding.
